title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Saksoft Global Group

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Saksoft Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
